strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript experience, including Node.js and React, utilized in high-impact roles like optimizing pricing strategies at Optilyz.
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators at re:cinq.
Exceptional background in software craftsmanship and testing, evidenced by teaching TDD and authoring custom testing libraries like Fluent-Asserts.
concerns: Missing explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest, which are core parts of the requested primary stack.
Kotlin and Python are not mentioned, and Java experience is relatively dated (last used in 2018 at Altom Consulting).
The resume contains a chronological inconsistency with a start date of April 2025 for the current role, suggesting a typo or formatting error.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with well over 6 years of engineering experience. He demonstrates deep expertise in the required TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack through his work at Optilyz and RIDE Capital, and directly matches the niche requirement for AI agent development via his work on MCP code generators at re:cinq. Furthermore, his profound dedication to testing practices—evidenced by his TDD workshops and custom testing libraries—aligns perfectly with the role's focus on reliable solutions. Although he lacks explicit experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin, his proven ability to build complex distributed systems (like GISCollective on Kubernetes) and adapt to various languages indicates he will quickly bridge any minor tooling gaps.
